description_long: This is a compact, modern microwave oven with a geometric, angular design and a predominantly blue exterior. The front features a large, dark rectangular window set into the door, accompanied by a vertical, white handle to the right and a small rectangular display or vent above it. The left and right sides are plain, with the right side showing no additional features. The rear of the microwave is equipped with three horizontal, dark gray vent slats, likely for heat dissipation. The appliance stands on four short, angled legs, giving it a slightly elevated stance. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern blue microwave with a large front window, white handle, and rear vent slats, standing on four angled legs.
description_view_0: The front view shows the large black window, white vertical handle, and a small rectangular feature above the handle.
description_view_1: The left side view is plain blue with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: The rear view displays three horizontal dark gray vent slats across the blue surface.
description_view_3: The right side view is featureless, showing only the blue surface and the legs.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A small rectangular feature to the upper right of the door may serve as a control panel, but no distinct buttons, dials, or touchpads are visible. There is no clear labeling or display.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a vertical, white, rectangular bar attached to the right side of the door, protruding outward for easy gripping. It appears to be made of plastic and is of moderate size, with a simple, angular design.
attribute_vent_placement: Three horizontal, dark gray vent slats are located on the rear surface of the microwave, evenly spaced and spanning most of the width.
attribute_window_presence: A large, rectangular, dark window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface.
